name: cv-asker
description: Local-first CV screening prototype with resume generation, ingestion, and chat.

scripts.dev: node ./apps/api/scripts/build-resume-styles.mjs && concurrently -k -n chat,api -c blue,green "vite build --watch --config apps/chat/vite.config.ts" "tsx watch apps/api/src/server.ts"
scripts.build: vite build --config apps/chat/vite.config.ts && node ./apps/api/scripts/build-resume-styles.mjs && tsc -p apps/api/tsconfig.json && node ./apps/api/scripts/copy-resume-assets.mjs
